updateContent.zh:
1. 新增功能
  • 图片马赛克：支持自由涂抹、画笔/像素大小调节、全图打码及局部恢复。
  • Favicon 生成：支持 11 种标准尺寸一键批量生成，可导出 PNG 及 ICO 格式。
  • PDF 解密：一键移除 PDF 密码保护，生成无密副本。
2. 交互与 UI 优化
  • 全页面适配：修复了所有页面 Toolbar 被状态栏遮挡、底部按钮被导航栏覆盖的问题。
  • 水印增强：设置面板改为常驻，新增 5 种快捷色块，图片水印支持百分比缩放。
  • 格式统一：图片相关工具统一采用动态格式选择器。
updateContent.en:
1. New Features
  • Image Pixellation: Support for freehand blurring, adjustable brush/pixel sizes, full-image censoring, and local unblurring.
  • Favicon Generator: Support for one-click bulk generation in 11 standard sizes, with export options for both PNG and ICO formats.
  • PDF Decryption: One-click removal of PDF password protection to generate an unencrypted copy.
2. UI & UX Optimizations
  • Full-Page Layout Adaptations: Fixed issues across all pages where the Toolbar was blocked by the status bar or bottom buttons were overlaid by the navigation bar.
  • Watermark Enhancements: The settings panel is now permanently visible, introducing 5 quick-select color swatches and percentage-based scaling for image watermarks.
  • Unified Formatting: Image-related tools now uniformly adopt a dynamic format selector.
